raw_consumer_statement: I was the victim of a scam involving a fraudulent merchant that collected payment through a payment link. Two charges totaling {$1100.00} appeared on my American Express account on XX/XX/year> ( {$99.00} ) and XX/XX/year> ( {$1000.00} ). When I discovered the fraud and contacted American Express, my dispute was denied because it fell outside the 60-day billing dispute window. However, this situation involves a fraudulent merchant and misrepresentation rather than a normal billing dispute. I have reported the matter to the payment processor and the FTC. I am requesting that American Express reconsider this case as a fraud investigation rather than applying the billing dispute time limit. Instead they have been giving me the run around and being unhelpful when I request for it to be reviewed as fraud by a supervisor.
